FEIYAP_CARD_MI_WANG.title: Mi Wang
FEIYAP_CARD_MI_WANG.description:
[gold]Eternal[/gold].
Cannot be played until the quest is complete.
Complete after dealing [blue]{Goal}[/blue] damage with [gold]Attacks[/gold].
When played, remove this card and gain the Investigator relic.
(Progress: [blue]{Progress}[/blue]/[blue]{Goal}[/blue])
